name: Song-Köl
description: Beautiful alpine lake surrounded by summer pastures, traditional yurts, and nomadic culture.

name: Issyk-Kul
description: A famous mountain lake surrounded by the Tian Shan range, known for beaches, resorts, and breathtaking scenery.

name: Ala-Archa National Park
description: A stunning mountain park near Bishkek, featuring glaciers, hiking trails, and dramatic alpine landscapes.

name: Sary-Chelek Biosphere Reserve
description: A protected natural area famous for its crystal-clear alpine lake, forests, and diverse wildlife.

name: Tash Rabat
description: An ancient stone caravanserai from the Silk Road era, located in a mountain valley near the Chinese border.

name: Burana Tower
description: A historic minaret and archaeological site that remains from the ancient city of Balasagun.

name: Skazka Canyon (Fairy Tale Canyon)
description: A colorful canyon famous for its unusual rock formations shaped by wind and erosion.

name: Karakol
description: A mountain city known for its nearby ski resort, hiking routes, traditional markets, and cultural landmarks.
